rule: Traditional Thai massage: wear provided loose-fitting clothes
notes: Most shops provide clean, comfortable clothing

rule: Oil massage: typically minimal clothing, covered with sheets
notes: Professional establishments maintain modesty with proper draping

rule: Tipping is appreciated but not mandatory, typically 50-100 THB
notes: Tip in cash, given directly to therapist

rule: Higher-end establishments may include service charge
notes: Check bill for included service charge

rule: Basic English usually spoken at tourist areas
notes: Simple gestures work well if language barrier exists

rule: Communicate pressure preferences: 'bao bao' (soft) or 'nak nak' (strong)
Extended sessions available at premium shops
Walk-ins usually accepted, but booking recommended for popular times
No advance payment required at legitimate shops
notes: Pay after service, beware of shops requiring upfront payment
